headline: This $58 Billion Merger Is Creating the Most Unstoppable Oil and Gas Stock in America
summary: Devon's tie-up with Coterra isn't just getting bigger--it's reshaping the company's cash-flow potential at a time when crude prices have swung back in its favor. The deal thesis hinges on scale, cost savings, and a shareholder-return plan that could look very different once the merger closes.
